auth.loginSubtitle: Your farm. Your language. Your AI assistant.
auth.loginHint: Sign in to get personalised crop advice, mandi prices, and government schemes — all in your language.
auth.accountHint: Sign in to sync your farm data across devices.
auth.signOutConfirmBody: Your data stays safe in the cloud. Sign back in anytime.
auth.terms: By continuing you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.
auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to sync your farm profile, mandi prices, and assistant history.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Use your name and email — you can start right away, no inbox checks.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

network.offlineBody: You are not on the internet. Turn on mobile data or connect to Wi‑Fi to enter online mode — then you can sync chats, get fresh mandi prices, and use photo analysis.
network.degradedBody: Your network is weak or unstable. Use Wi‑Fi or move to a stronger signal to enter full online mode and faster sync.

onboarding.welcome: Your farm. Your language. Your assistant.
onboarding.locationEnableBody: Turn on location and allow access to auto-fill your state and district.
onboarding.modelProgress: Setting things up for offline use
onboarding.farmerNameHint: Optional if you already used your name at sign-up.
onboarding.soilTypeHint: Tap to match your field; helps tailor advice.
onboarding.locationSub: Same details we save to your farm profile (twin) — language, place, land, soil, and crops.
onboarding.locationGpsHint: We send your real GPS coordinates with chats and your farm profile so advice matches your area — not a demo location.

home.offlineGoOnlineHint: Connect to Wi‑Fi or mobile data to switch to online mode.
home.syncBody: 2 updates (Soil Health, Pest Alert) are waiting for internet to sync.
home.weatherError: Could not load weather. Tap refresh to try again.
home.priceFootnote: Prices last updated 18 hours ago. Market trends may have changed.
home.sowingSub: Plan your next harvest even without a network. Downloaded guide for Cotton and Bajra is available offline.
home.expertTitle: Protect your wheat from yellow rust
home.expertSub: AI detected high humidity in your region. Learn prevention steps.
home.farmStatus: Your farm in {{place}} is showing optimal growth today.
home.aiInsightsDesc: Ideal time for wheat irrigation starts tomorrow.
home.marketPulseDesc: Wheat prices up by 4% in local Mandi
home.guideTitle: New Bio-Fertilizer Guide for Summer Crops

chat.placeholder: Ask about crops, weather, or schemes
chat.title: Assistant
chat.subtitle: On-device and online answers, based on your connection.
chat.listTabSubtitle: Open a chat below, or tap + in the tab bar for a new one.
chat.offlineStrip: Offline — answers use saved knowledge on this device.
chat.headerSubtitleDefault: Ask about crops, weather, and schemes.
chat.emptyHint: Ask a question below or attach a photo. Chats sync to your account when you are online.
chat.placeholderOffline: Ask using knowledge saved on this device
chat.placeholderOfflineNoModel: Connect to the internet to chat
chat.placeholderDegraded: Ask anything — connection may be slow
chat.emptyHintOffline: You are offline. Replies use the assistant on this device. Chats sync when you are back online.
chat.emptyHintOfflineNoModel: You are offline and the on-device assistant is not ready. Connect to the internet to chat.
chat.sessionStartingOffline: Starting… offline — history syncs when you are online
chat.modeBannerDegraded: Limited connection — online features may be slower.
chat.modeBannerOffline: Offline — using the assistant on this device.
chat.modeBannerOfflineNoModel: Offline — connect to the internet to use the assistant.
chat.empty: Start by asking a question about your farm below.
chat.imageUploadFailed: Image upload failed. Try again or remove image.
chat.thinkingDescRouting: Understanding your question and farm context
chat.thinkingDescPlanning: Choosing the best way to answer
chat.sessionError: Session sync failed — replies won't be saved to history
chat.sessionsEmpty: No past chats yet. Start a new conversation below.
chat.sessionsOffline: Connect to the internet to see and open your saved chats.
chat.sessionsOfflineWithModel: You're offline. You can still chat using the assistant saved on this device.
chat.offlineSessionsFootnote: Offline mode uses one on-device thread. Starting new clears that thread. Your online sessions list will sync when you're back on the network.
chat.deleteSessionMessage: “{{title}}” will be removed from your account. You cannot undo this.
chat.deleteSessionFailedBody: Check your connection and try again.
chat.safetyBlock: I cannot answer this safely. Please consult an expert.

mandi.title: Mandi prices
mandi.empty: No mandi prices loaded yet. Pull down to sync the latest for your state and district, or finish onboarding if you have not completed it.
mandi.regionStateOnly: {{state}} (showing state-level — your district has no data today)
mandi.emptyNoReport: No prices reported today for this area. Markets report daily — try a nearby state or check back tomorrow.
mandi.listsOffline: Connect to the internet to load the state and district lists.
mandi.listsNoApiKey: Add EXPO_PUBLIC_DATA_GOV_API_KEY to your .env and restart the dev server.
mandi.listsError: Could not load the list. Check your connection and try again.

profile.title: Profile & settings
profile.locationIncompleteBody: Enter state and district (at least 2 letters each).

scan.title: Scan crop
scan.body: Take a photo or pick from gallery. We resize and send it securely for analysis.
scan.permission: Camera or photo access was denied. Enable it in system settings.
scan.error: Could not send image for analysis

offline.modelDownloadingGeneral: AI model is downloading. Here is what I found from cached data:
offline.modelDownloadingWeather: AI model is downloading. Weather data requires a live connection — please connect to the internet for the latest forecast.
offline.modelNotDownloaded: Please download the AI model first to chat offline. Go to Settings > Download Offline Model.
offline.modelNotDownloadedWeather: Please download the AI model first to get offline weather insights, or connect to the internet for the latest forecast.
offline.visionUnavailable: Image analysis is not available on this device in offline mode.
offline.inferenceTimeout: Response timed out. Please try again.
offline.wifiWarningBody: You are not on Wi-Fi. Downloading on mobile data may use a large amount of your data plan. Do you want to continue?
offline.wifiRequiredToContinue: Download paused. Connect to Wi‑Fi to continue, or go back and try again.

voice.speaker: Speaker
voice.topicWaiting: Ask me anything about your farm…

error.serverWaking: Voice server is waking up. Wait a moment and try again.

errors.networkBusy: Network is busy. Answering from your device.
errors.retryLater: Please try again in a moment.

modelDownload.bannerText: Use Krishisaath AI without internet — download the offline model (~1.5 GB)
modelDownload.consentBody: KrishiSaathi AI will save an offline model to your device. This enables AI features without internet — no data charges once downloaded.
